properties.property_specification: If COM_DISARM_MAN is 1, then disarming can possibly occur in manual thrust modes such as Stabilized or Acro.
properties.uppaal_formula: E<> ( disarmed && (mode == Stabilized || mode == Acro) && COM_DISARM_MAN == 1 )
properties.reason: Possibility property extracted from the comment for parameter value 1, indicating that disarming is permitted in specified modes.

properties.property_specification: If the vehicle is armed and does not take off within COM_DISARM_PRFLT seconds, it will eventually disarm.

properties.reason: Describes the auto disarm behavior when the timeout is reached without takeoff, assuming COM_DISARM_PRFLT is positive.

properties.property_specification: When the system is in Hold mode and the time since entering Hold is at least COM_FAIL_ACT_T seconds, it eventually enters the failsafe action.

properties.property_specification: If the system is in Mission or Loiter mode, the EPH is below the COM_POS_LOW_EPH threshold, the threshold is not disabled, and the local position is valid, then the system will eventually enter RTL mode.
properties.uppaal_formula: (COM_POS_LOW_EPH != -1 && eph < COM_POS_LOW_EPH && (mode == Mission || mode == Loiter) && pos_valid) --> (mode == RTL)
properties.reason: Describes the additional condition for triggering RTL when in specific modes with valid position.

properties.property_specification: The ground contact state is active if and only if there is no vertical movement (absolute vertical velocity less than or equal to LNDMC_Z_VEL_MAX), no horizontal movement (absolute horizontal velocity less than or equal to LNDMC_XY_VEL_MAX), thrust is below the calculated threshold (thrust < MPC_THR_MIN + (hover_throttle - MPC_THR_MIN) * (0.6 if hover thrust estimate is available, else 0.3)), and if the vehicle is in height-rate controlled flight mode, the vertical velocity setpoint is above LNDMC_Z_VEL_MAX (indicating intent to descend), and if a distance sensor is present, the distance to ground is below 1 meter.
properties.uppaal_formula: A[] (ground_contact == (abs(z_vel) <= LNDMC_Z_VEL_MAX && abs(xy_vel) <= LNDMC_XY_VEL_MAX && thrust < (MPC_THR_MIN + (hover_throttle - MPC_THR_MIN) * (hover_thrust_est_available ? 0.6 : 0.3)) && (!in_height_rate_mode || vert_vel_setpoint > LNDMC_Z_VEL_MAX) && (!has_distance_sensor || distance_to_ground < 1.0))
properties.reason: Defines the necessary and sufficient conditions for the ground contact state as an invariant property.

properties.property_specification: The system is in this state only if all conditions of the ground contact state are true, it is not rotating, has low thrust, and no freefall is detected.
